articles.content: TL;DR: Async inference through an AI gateway lets CI build workers submit a long LLM job, get an id back, and poll later, so a 30-second model call stops holding a worker hostage. Here's how I wired it with Bifrost. Our build workers at Buildkite were each blocked for up to 35 seconds waiting on a single LLM call that summarised failed test output. articles.content: Software teams often face a false choice: move fast and accumulate technical debt, or build the perfect system and miss the deadline.
